title: Stream with pipe
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This copy function reads an entire file into memory with `readFileSync` and writes it back out. For large files that exhausts memory.

Replace it with a stream: create a read stream with `fs.createReadStream` and `.pipe(` it into the write stream. Streams move data in chunks without buffering the whole file.
objectives: Pipe it to the destination with `.pipe(...)`

parseRules.failMessage: Pipe the stream to the destination with `.pipe(...)`.
